word_list.pronunciation: ɐ ʃˈʌt klˈoʊzd mˈaʊθ kˈætʃᵻz nˈoʊ flˈaɪz

senses.definition: used to encourage people to think carefully before speaking and to consider the potential consequences of their words, recognizing that sometimes it is better to say nothing at all

examples.x: When it comes to gossip, I've learned that a shut mouth catches no flies.

senses.definition: used to say that once a person has died, they cannot reveal any secrets or information, particularly used to caution someone against revealing sensitive or potentially dangerous information

examples.x: If you're thinking of speaking out against the company, remember that dead men tell no tales.

word_list.word: fields have eyes, (and|) woods have ears
word_list.pronunciation: fˈiːldz hæv ˈaɪz ænd wˈʊdz hæv ˈɪɹz

senses.definition: used to suggest that even in seemingly private locations, there may be someone present who could overhear or observe one's actions, so one should always be mindful of their behavior
used to emphasize that secrets have a way of being revealed eventually, and so it is important to act with integrity and honesty in all aspects of life

word_list.word: secrets are secrets for a reason

senses.definition: used to encourage people to be cautious about sharing information that has been shared with them in confidence, recognizing that doing so can damage relationships and weaken trust

word_list.word: three (may|might) keep a secret if two are dead
word_list.pronunciation: θɹˈiː mˈeɪ mˌaɪt kˈiːp ɐ sˈiːkɹət ɪf tˈuː ɑːɹ dˈɛd

senses.definition: used to imply that it is important to be careful about who one shares confidential information with, as each additional person who is told the secret increases the risk of it being disclosed

examples.x: The spy knew that they couldn't trust anyone, since three may keep a secret if two are dead.

word_list.word: what happens in Vegas, stays in Vegas
word_list.pronunciation: wˌʌt hˈæpənz ɪn vˈeɪɡəs stˈeɪz ɪn vˈeɪɡəs

senses.definition: used to imply that any scandalous activities that occur during group travel should not be discussed with others outside of the group
